evals.name: full_pipeline_init
evals.prompt: Run a full discovery for Acme Banking Core System
expectations: Declares expert committee with 7 members plus conductor
Generates living discovery plan with input registry
Activates industry SME lens for banking
Sequences all phases with data contracts

evals.name: quick_reference_variant
evals.prompt: We need a quick go/no-go assessment for RetailCo POS system
expectations: Selects quick reference variant (Phases 1, 3, 5b only)
Skips phases 0, 2, 4, 5a appropriately
Estimates 1-2 week timeline
Still activates expert committee with reduced allocation

evals.name: gate_enforcement
evals.prompt: Phase 3 scenarios are ready. Evaluate Gate 1 for scenario approval
expectations: Checks all 6 Gate 1 criteria with evidence
Requires steering committee sign-off
Blocks progression if criteria not met
Presents options on gate failure

evals.name: missing_input_handling
evals.prompt: Start the discovery but we don't have source code access yet
expectations: Halts pipeline and requests source code access
Identifies source code as non-negotiable input
Suggests workarounds for other missing inputs
Updates input registry with missing items

evals.name: status_reporting
evals.prompt: What is the current status of our discovery pipeline?
expectations: Presents pipeline status with phase progress
Shows active experts and their assignments
Lists open assumptions and risks
Estimates remaining timeline and next gate
